hero.sub: The digital platform modernizing vehicle rental in Colombia. Book in minutes, pay safely and drive without hassle.

como.label: Simple process
como.sub: In 4 steps your vehicle is ready to drive

pasos.desc: Register in minutes and upload your driver's license for verification.
Browse the fleet, filter by category, price and availability.
Select dates, branch and payment method. Receive your digital contract.
Pick up your vehicle, enjoy the ride and rate your experience.

features.label: All included
features.sub: A complete platform designed for your convenience

items.desc: More than 50 vehicles: SUVs, sedans, economy and sports cars for every need.
PSE, Nequi, credit/debit cards through Wompi with SSL/TLS encryption.
Sign your contract online with legal validity. No paperwork, no queues.
Pick up and return your vehicle at the nearest branch with real-time availability.
Book from your Android phone. Adapted interface for a smooth experience on any device.
Read verified reviews from other drivers and rate your experience after each trip.

cta.sub: Join hundreds of drivers who already trust RentaMovil.

footer.desc: Digital vehicle rental platform developed in Colombia. Safe, efficient and accessible.
